question.label: Arrive here
question.name: Before we go further, what feels most important to put on the table today?
question.description: Covers the under-served landing stage and gives him low-pressure control over where to start from here.

answer: I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.

assessment.note: He names a mismatch between the direction he believes he can own and the authority he currently lacks, signalling mild strain and unclear operating scope. [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'real authority' to own bigger direction.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help this feel more workable over the next couple of weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.

After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
